Gareth joins Lincolnshire MPs to meet Minister for Dentistry on Lincoln Dental School Campaign - 28/04/26

Tuesday, 28 April, 2026
Pleased to join fellow Lincolnshire MPs this morning to meet with the Health Minister responsible for dentistry, Stephen Kinnock MP, as we continue to support the campaign led by the University of Lincoln for a Lincoln Dental School. We have always been clear that NHS dental services in Lincolnshire are an issue. This would be a clear, practical step to seeing more dentists training and hopefully...
